forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.message: You do not have permission to view this area.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.message: The page you are looking for may have moved, changed, or no longer exists.

unauthorized_panel.title: Access required
unauthorized_panel.message: You need appropriate permissions to view this area. Contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.

growth_partner_required.title: Growth Partner account required
growth_partner_required.message: This area is available for registered Aipify Growth Partners. If you want to represent Aipify, complete the Growth Partner registration and certification process.

platform_required.title: Platform access required
platform_required.message: This area is only available for authorized Aipify Platform users.

super_admin_required.title: Super Admin access required
super_admin_required.message: This area is restricted to authorized Aipify Group AS system administrators.

app_required.title: APP access required
app_required.message: This area belongs to an Aipify customer organization. Please log in with an authorized account.

subscription_required.title: Subscription required
subscription_required.message: This organization requires an active subscription to access operational features.

suspended_account.title: Subscription required
suspended_account.message: This organization is currently paused because the subscription requires attention. Billing, invoices, and support remain available.

cancelled_account.title: Account cancelled
cancelled_account.message: This organization subscription has been cancelled. Contact support if you need to restore access.

humanVerification.title: Quick verification
humanVerification.description: Complete this short check to continue.
